Remixfy

AI-powered rap lyrics and beat generation platform. Prompt-based music production with FastAPI backend and React frontend.

  • FastAPI
  • React
  • OpenAI API
  • MusicGen
  • PyTorch
  • Stable Audio
Source on GitHub →

Remixfy is a prompt-based AI rap lyrics and beat generation platform built from the ground up. The system architecture rests on a FastAPI backend + React frontend (remixfy-ui) and features two core production pipelines.

Lyrics Engine: Takes user inputs like topic, mood, and BPM, enriches them through prompt engineering, and generates high-quality rap lyrics via the OpenAI API (GPT-4.1 model).

Beat Production Pipeline: A three-tier fallback architecture ensures the system never crashes. The ideal path uses a locally-running MusicGen model (torch + transformers) to generate music from prompts. If unavailable, it falls back to the external Stable Audio API. If that also fails, pre-generated or dynamically-created fallback WAV files kick in. This entire structure is stabilized with thread-safe caching, TTL invalidation, sine-wave fallback generation, MIME awareness, and performance optimizations.

The project is currently at MVP level, correctly architected, and designed to scale. Short-term goal: deploy a lightweight backend version on Vercel. Medium-term: isolate beat generation as a microservice on Render/VPS. Long-term: evolve prompt engineering toward style transfer, artist embedding, and real dataset-based beat training to approach Stable Audio-level quality.
